signals.text: Very active email thread: Pulkit sent funnel drafts for Supreme Creme on Apr 14, Ryan shared assets on Apr 10
Two calls in one week (Apr 7 check-in + Apr 8 onboarding with Deepa) showing strong re-engagement
Supreme Creme relaunch target date Apr 22 creates urgency and clear deliverable timeline
New team member Deepa (configuration specialist from Guthy-Renker) onboarded to FERMAT platform on Apr 8
Previous 2-3 month hold on all FERMAT work; re-engagement just started in April
No upcoming call currently scheduled -- need to book next sync before Apr 22 launch
Meta ads approved for Westmore Beauty on Apr 10, indicating active paid media campaign

recent.title: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT
recent.summary: Full platform onboarding walkthrough with Deepa from Guthy-Renker. Covered funnel building, PDP editor, bundle creation, price testing, and review management. Deepa was invited to the FERMAT account during the call. Technical/scoping and onboarding session.

recent.title: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT
recent.participants: Pulkit Srivastava (pulkit@fermatcommerce.com), Ryan Ruger, Brenda Hernandez (bhernandez@westmorebeauty.com), Deepa
recent.summary: Westmore Beauty is relaunching Supreme Cream on April 22nd. Team wants to use FERMAT for alternative landing pages and optimized PDPs. Previous work was on hold for 2-3 months. Pulkit committed to delivering V1 funnel draft by next day. Ryan will share new product assets. Dedicated onboarding session offered to Deepa.
action_items: Send follow-up email summarizing required assets for Supreme Cream launch
Create and deliver V1 funnel draft by Apr 8 afternoon
Update PDP with new assets for review
Schedule 45-min platform onboarding call with Deepa
Add Deepa to the FERMAT platform

recent.title: Westmore Beauty <> FERMAT | Launch Kick Off
recent.participants: Brenda Hernandez (bhernandez@westmorebeauty.com), Jessica Tennant (jtennant@westmorebeauty.com), Talia Cohen (talia@fermatcommerce.com), Pulkit Srivastava (pulkit@fermatcommerce.com), Ryan Ruger (rruger@westmorebeauty.com)
recent.summary: Launch kick-off call with executive presence and agency involvement. Covered onboarding, funnel builder, technical/scoping. Objections raised. Multiple external stakeholders present including brand team and agency partners.

calls.analysis: Westmore Beauty re-engaged strongly in April after a 2-3 month hold. Two calls in one week (Apr 7-8) focused on the Supreme Creme relaunch (Apr 22 target). New team member Deepa from Guthy-Renker was onboarded to the platform. Active email follow-up with Ryan Ruger sharing assets and Pulkit delivering funnel drafts. Prior calls include the Feb launch kick-off and a Mar 11 working session (per Granola) where Jessica was frustrated with delays.

slack.analysis: No Slack MCP available for this refresh.

messages.subject: Re: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT | Check-In Recap -- Apr 7
messages.snippet: Hi Ryan, Thanks for sharing the assets! I created two draft funnels for Supreme Creme that we can test against your existing landing page.

messages.subject: Re: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT | Check-In Recap -- Apr 7
messages.snippet: Please find New Supreme Creme assets here. You should be able to access this folder. In the folder, there are product images but I will share the product details.

messages.subject: Your ads were approved
messages.snippet: Your ads were approved and should begin delivering shortly.

messages.subject: Re: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT | Check-In Recap -- Apr 7
messages.snippet: I am currently working on getting those assets ready for you. Will follow-up by EOD.

messages.subject: Re: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT | Check-In Recap -- Apr 7
messages.snippet: Just checking in to see if Ryan can share the Supreme Cream assets and product documentation so I can get my team started on creating the funnels.

messages.subject: Meeting assets for Westmore Beauty x FERMAT are ready!

email.analysis: Very active email thread between Pulkit and Ryan Ruger (Westmore Beauty) from Apr 7-14 around the Supreme Creme relaunch. Pulkit sent a check-in recap after the Apr 7 call, followed up for assets on Apr 9, Ryan responded with assets on Apr 10, and Pulkit shared two draft funnels on Apr 14. Meta ads were also approved on Apr 10. This is a healthy, responsive communication pattern with quick turnaround times from both sides.
